review_title: Much needed system to manage employees & payroll in today's business world
description: The process has taken several months to complete, but it was needed to understand all the steps and to not overwhelm the managers and the employees.....and myself honestly. I had weekly web meetings with [sensitive content hidden] and he was great. We started with just having the employees get accustomed to the new time clock. For a few weeks they clocked into the old time clocks and the new fingerprint based clocks from TimeForge. We slowly added more functionality to the system while training managers. Managers now have more information at their fingertips in order to make the best decisions for the business based on historic and real time data. It cuts the time down needed to do the mundane tasks that were taking up too much time in the past. Anytime we had questions or asked if the system could do a specific function, [sensitive content hidden] had an answer and showed us how to access it. There are so many reports and functions available to us now. We can make real time decisions to make the best use of our time and labor hours.
author: Ronni C.
pros: TimeForge allows us to manage our scheduling, employee attendance, employee requests off, real time labor percentages, and sales projections all in one system. Our manager time needed to complete all of this is being reduced as the managers become more comfortable and knowledgeable with the system. We are coming from an old school time clock system where employees used time cards to punch in and out. The managers then had to put all of the times, some of which would need correction or more explanation to get the correct time, into an excel spreadsheet which was emailed to me so payroll could be completed. Scheduling was either handwritten or done on an excel spreadsheet every week. With TimeForge, everything can be monitored in real time. Since it's web based, administrators can access each location and work in the system and pull payroll independently of manager assistance. The employees also have access to a phone app where they can access their weekly schedule, request time off, and request a shift swap (with manager approval).
cons: Initially, what I was worried about was the cost. While we did have a discount because we are members of Associated Wholesale Grocers, being an independent grocer in rural areas makes any extra costs a deterrent as an owner. However, once I completed the training process with [sensitive content hidden] (who was wonderful) and the managers were trained, we will pay for the service with the savings in my and the managers' time and with the increased real time data available to use labor hours when they are actually needed. What started out as a "con" has turned into a "pro" with measurable savings.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My experience has been great.
author: Kaitlyn M.
pros: The customer service is amazing. If I run into an issue, I can reach out to them and they are always willing to help. Payroll is a breeze and I love all the reports I can generate from it. PTO tracking is my favorite part, it's very easy to use and helps me keep track of all the employees we have.
cons: I haven't come across anything I didn't like, but maybe new reports or reports that could pull the unreportable data in there would be nice like dates.

description: The time forge team has been fantastic at working through the Implementation and customization of the software. Everything they do exhibits their high degree of customer service.
author: Rocky C.
pros: This software provides a solid time and attendance platform.
cons: We are still working through understanding and determining the full spectrum of reporting tools, there is a lot to dial into.

description: Overall experience with TimeForge has been fantastic, I can't say enough about the team. They readily jump in to help with any issues we have and overall made this a very smooth transition. This was a drastic change for our company to say the least and they really worked to make it seamless.
author: Melissa M.
pros: The integration of the program was excellent. I really enjoy the ability to view each store easily as a snapshot, the reporting functions are incredibly helpful, and I love that we can focus on labor tracking and scheduling.
cons: This was a big integration for our company, and we were able to combine a few platforms which was great. The issue with combining multiple platforms is that sometimes you lose features that you enjoyed. We have a few areas that are lacking as we moved from a LMS to an HRIS system which changed the amount of interaction on the hiring side. We also lost a few of our main reporting functions for new hires. The TimeForge team has been extremely helpful though in working to find solutions.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Over all Timeforge is the best, and is the easiest software to use. I have tried others but by far its the best.
author: Tommy F.
pros: The best thing about the software is the ease of doing payroll, and the way it keeps employees from punching in early trying to get overtime.
cons: The finger print reader doesn't work for everbody. Also the break punch in and out doesn't work right.

review_title: Time Forge - Easy to use for Time, Attendance and Scheduling
description: Timeforge jumped in to help when our prior time keeping program failed. They were quick to respond and help us with putting a time and attendance program in place. They have have great customer service and answer all of my teams question in a timely manner. Their development staff has been great in helping us through the on boarding of Timeforge and molding it to best fit our needs.
author: Aaron S.
pros: It is easy to use and almost plug and play. Customer Service is top notch and quick to respond. Very customizable for your needs
cons: Too many available reports and can be a struggle to find the specific one you are looking for.

description: We could not have had a better implementation team! As we were a startup, opening a Kitchen & Market mid pandemic, we had a lot of ground to cover. We are so grateful to have [SENSITIVE CONTENT] on our side leading the charge with our implementation. They are team players and go above and beyond to ensure for seamless experience. We could not have asked for anyone better. Not only that, they are a blast to work with! Thank you!
author: Tessa B.
pros: TimeForge is intuitive and extremely user friendly. We love the AI technology that helps us make timely data driven decisions on one of our highest operating expenses. Labor scheduling and management can be very complex. We appreciate all the automated features that helps us stay aware of our blind spots and keeps us focused on our Guests. We also love that we can automate and track progress on punch lists, take performance notes, manage our food safety certifications by shift and more! It's evident that this software was built with the end user in mind.
cons: None- the software met and exceeded our expectations

description: WE were wasting a ton of money on employees taking longer than scheduled breaks. Also we did not have a system to track PTO efficiently and with Time Forge we have that in place now.
author: Joe S.
pros: The Program is very easy to use and was very easy to roll out. There was nothing complicated about program at all. IF three were questions the support staff was always willing to do anything needed to resolve any issue that may arise.
cons: There was only one feature that could be better and that was the ability slid schedules on a schedule bar to accept the changes that needed to be made on a schedule. Everything else works GREAT!

description: TimeForge is a homerun if you are looking for functionality and to save time. The support is top-notch as well. Thank you TimeForge for your partnership.
author: Adam K.
pros: I think for me is the ease of use, I have cut down the hours of writing schedules from 3-4 hours to about 1 to 2 hours. This allows me to compare sales to the hours used in real time instead of after the fact.
cons: The only negative I would say is that when you are in writing schedules it pulls you from the section you are working on and refreshes it and puts you at the top of the application.

description: The TimeForge team is a very attentive and customer-focused operation. There was never an issue that they haven't resolved for us in a timely manner. They are always looking for ways to improve their product for each customer's individual needs.
author: Robert E.
pros: TimeForge's UI is very user-friendly. It's very easy to learn and teach to others. We have always seen accurate reporting and forecasting with this product and I would recommend it to anyone.
cons: The only negative feedback that I can provide would be around enterprise-wide messaging. I would like to see more granularity in messaging recipients. The only options are to send to the whole company or individually pick the stores/roles I need to contact.

author: Kris A.
pros: The best part of the software is the intuitive nature of the UI and the mobile experience. Gives the user exactly what they need and want by role!
cons: Dynamic reporting was the biggest opportunity; however, the new reporting tool is outstanding!

description: Overall, we had a great experience with TimeForge. We used their software to lower our expenses and more closely track time and attendance. I definitely recommend TimeForge!
author: Glen W.
pros: Personally, I really liked the sales forecasting tool. We were able to use this to help our managers create weekly schedules and enforce a labor cost percentage.
cons: We are comfortable with the functionality and it met out needs.

description: My experience has been great. The customer service has been amazing.
author: Derek B.
pros: The product is easy to use and intuitive.
cons: I would like to see a report to run the username of each user. I understand that most of the time that it is the email, but for companies that would like to have a unique username log in, it would be nice to have.

review_title: Simplify Scheduling And HR With TimeForge
description: It is rare to find a labor management solution focused on a specific segment of the retail industry. However, Anthony Presley, who started the service after observing a friend’s problems, has a simple rationale for focusing on the restaurant and retail industries. “In these markets, labor is a key controllable expense,” he says. “Also, there are a lot of hourly employees in the restaurant and retail industries – with fewer salaried staff.” Labor problems can result in staff churn and directly affect the project.
author: Rakesh Sharma
pros: The TimeForge suite of applications makes it easy and affordable for small businesses to focus on their core unique selling points by automating several HR-related tasks such as scheduling and attendance.

description: Overall, the experience was great. [sensitive content hidden] took time with us to get us up to speed and took care of all the concerns and bugs.
author: Q Doh P.
pros: Value for Money, Customer Support, White-glove service, Ease of use, Scheduling, Clock In and Out, On-boarding. Integration with RMH for Sales.
cons: It is not that I don't like TimeForge; compared to the previous platform that I used, TimeForge does not have a free job ad account or integration. With the previous ones, they posted to several job sites when we have a job opening under their account.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Automates payroll and scheduling for chemical services.
description: TimeForge simplified team schedule and payroll tracking, enabling Quimainca's managers to maintain shifts in order and reduce hand errors for enormous industrial teams.
author: Juan S.
pros: TimeForge payroll and scheduling features are easy to use, track employees' hours easily, and have supportive assistance that eliminates day-to-day drudgery.
cons: Teams remark on the interface, otherwise uncluttered, sometimes appearing clumsy in doing large-scale edits or complex scheduling, sometimes taking a while to update shift changes in active departments.

description: It has been a pleasent and valued ecperience. We have several partners contributing to our tech stack none have been better and doi g what they said they we do and supporting us throughout the integration and utilization.
author: Scott B.
pros: The product is strong and performs as promised. The support theyve provoded has been even better in area products and companies all to often uver promise, under deliver, and desert you once they have your business.
cons: I have to pay for it, lol. We are excited about future plans to allow team members to communicate with one another more directly than they can now.

description: Wonderful. Their platform and people are the best.
author: Mark E.
pros: All the employees are top notch and knowledgeable. Wonderful to work with .
cons: Wish I knew about them sooner. Their platform is easy to use and very complete. Totally meets and exceeded our expectations.

review_title: Makes Life Easier for Mid-Size Family Business
description: It has made us more organized and efficient and helped us to keep in touch with our employees easily.
author: Jess G.
pros: Employees can see their schedule and request time off and paid time off from their app. Managers have employee contact info at their fingertips without seeing other sensitive info. Exports hours easily to our payroll provider. Automatically tracks, deducts, and reloads PTO on employee's anniversary date by employee classification.
cons: I would like the fields to be wider in employee information tab so I can see all the info better.

review_title: TimeForge Works! It's Cost Effective and Support is Great.
description: The Team at TimeForge is great. [sensitive content hidden], the Onboarding and Training Team are great to work with. They understand retail needs and retail users. Their Service and Support is great. We like the software and the people.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Employee Scheduling can be complex to set-up, on-board and train users to use, but the Team at TimeForge knows retail, designed the system for retail users to be easy to use and the schedules are very accurate. When I compared the features, functions, on-boarding Support and cost... TimeForge Wins!
cons: No Scheduling system is perfect but TimeForge works, easily adapts to user needs. Because it's fit-for-purpose in retail and and the workflow makes sense it makes it easy to implement.

description: See above. It's just a great company to work with.
author: Rick A.
pros: The representative assigned to assist us with implementation was amazing. He was attentive to our needs and pleasant to work with. He always had an answer for us promptly. We currently have a number of vendors that we are working with, and TimeForge is by far the best. The interface is easy to use and the app fits in with the evolution of scheduling. It does not require a great deal of explanation and is well received. The option to swap shifts is very convenient.
cons: No integration with our sales program, so some options are rendered useless. No Quickbooks export file
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: In the current employment situation we are facing it is a great tool to help us become more efficient and try to do more with less. Helps keep track of our labor percentage real time so we are far more proactive in decision making. Excellent help desk that gets back to you.
author: Aaron F.
pros: Cloud based, ties into our sales on the front end, get real time information to be proactive instead of reactive in decision making. Easy to use, employee app, manager app, employee messaging, lots of features.
cons: Not any complaints, works great for our situation.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I love the reports you can run, and it saves me so much time.
author: Bernadette S.
pros: I love that I can always get a hold of a knowledgeable IT person. He is prompt in answering my email/calls and always walks me through any issues I run across.
cons: I would like for the App to have a messaging system directly.

description: Easy to use, tech support is very responsive and helpful, I enjoy the program and would recommend to others.
author: Jill B.
pros: Easy to create schedules and disseminate pertinent information to staff.
cons: Not that I can think of right now. Glad the classic view of the schedules is still there, because I'm not as fond of the new view.

review_title: TimeForge makes Time and Attendance easy
description: Our old Time and Attendance system was unreliable. Also, all it did was keep up with employee attendance. You weren't able to schedule, keep track of PTO, forecast sales, and many other things. All of these were fixed by switching to TimeForge.
author: Adam N.
pros: Employees particularly like to see what their estimated paycheck will be based on what they have worked. Management finds making schedules and keeping up with PTO and attendance to be easier than other programs we have used in the past. Integration into our POS to enable sales forecasting was simple and non-invasive. I would recommend TimeForge to anyone looking for a Scheduling, PTO tracking, or Time and Attendance system.
cons: The only improvement I would recommend would be communication in the app. It would be useful to be able to send messages to employees and have them reply directly to them through the app or website.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
